verses.1: Give ear to my words, LORD.
verses.2: Listen to the voice of my cry, my King and my God,
verses.3: LORD, in the morning you will hear my voice.
verses.4: For you are not a God who has pleasure in wickedness.
verses.5: The arrogant will not stand in your sight.
verses.6: You will destroy those who speak lies.
verses.7: But as for me, in the abundance of your loving kindness I will come into your house.
verses.8: Lead me, LORD, in your righteousness because of my enemies.
verses.9: For there is no faithfulness in their mouth.
verses.11: But let all those who take refuge in you rejoice.
verses.12: For you will bless the righteous.
